relationship.description: One album can have many permission records (album_id → PERMISSION.album_id)
One role can be linked to many permission records (role_id → PERMISSION.role_id)
One user can grant many permission records (user_id → PERMISSION.granted_by_user_id)

metadata.improvements_made: Added audit attributes: created_at for ALBUM, granted_at and granted_by_user_id for PERMISSION. Introduced USER entity to capture the granter of permissions and defined explicit foreign‑key relationships. Kept original minimal structure and clear naming while enhancing traceability.
